page.name: Brake FX
page.pad1: var 'brakeFXlong' 1 ? var 'BrakeFX1' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX1_wait' & set 'BrakeFX1' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'echo' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX1' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.58 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX1_wait' 1400ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.6 0.3 0.7 'Mute Source:on' 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX1' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX1_wait' 2600ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX1' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BrakeFX1' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on : var 'BrakeFX1' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX1_wait' & set 'BrakeFX1' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'echo' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX1' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.41 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX1_wait' 700ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.6 0.3 0.7 'Mute Source:on' 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX1' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX1_wait' 1300ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX1' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BrakeFX1' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on
page.pad5: var 'brakeFXlong' 1 ? var 'BrakeFX6' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX6_wait' & set 'BrakeFX6' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'phaser' off & effect_active 'echo' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX6' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.58 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX6_wait' 1000ms 1 & padfx 'phaser' 0.7 0.5 0.2 0.7 0 & var 'BrakeFX6' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX6_filter' 1000ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.6 0.3 0.7 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX6' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX6_wait' 2000ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX6' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'phaser' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BrakeFX6' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on : var 'BrakeFX6' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX6_wait' & set 'BrakeFX6' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'phaser' off & effect_active 'echo' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX6' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.41 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX6_wait' 500ms 1 & padfx 'phaser' 0.7 0.5 0.2 0.7 0 & var 'BrakeFX6' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX6_filter' 500ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.6 0.3 0.7 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX6' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX6_wait' 1000ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX6' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'phaser' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BrakeFX6' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on
page.pad2: var 'brakeFXlong' 1 ? var 'BrakeFX2' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX2_wait' & set 'BrakeFX2' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'enigma jet' off & effect_active 'echo' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX2' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.58 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX2_wait' 1400ms 1 & padfx 'enigma jet' 0.45 0.45 & var 'BrakeFX2' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX2_wait' 600ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.6 0.3 0.7 'Mute Source:on' 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX2' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX2_wait' 2000ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX2' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'enigma jet' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BrakeFX2' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' : var 'BrakeFX2' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX2_wait' & set 'BrakeFX2' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'enigma jet' off & effect_active 'echo' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX2' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.41 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX2_wait' 700ms 1 & padfx 'enigma jet' 0.45 0.45 & var 'BrakeFX2' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX2_wait' 300ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.6 0.3 0.7 'Mute Source:on' 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX2' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX2_wait' 1000ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX2' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'enigma jet' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BrakeFX2' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart'
page.pad3: var 'brakeFXlong' 1 ? var 'BrakeFX3' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX3_wait' & set 'BrakeFX3' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'spiral' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX3' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.58 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX3_wait' 1400ms 1 & padfx 'spiral' 0.25 & var 'BrakeFX3' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX3_wait' 2600ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX3' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'spiral' off & set 'BrakeFX3' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on : var 'BrakeFX3' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX3_wait' & set 'BrakeFX3' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'spiral' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX3' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.41 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX3_wait' 700ms 1 & padfx 'spiral' 0.25 & var 'BrakeFX3' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX3_wait' 1300ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX3' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'spiral' off & set 'BrakeFX3' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on
page.pad4: var 'brakeFXlong' 1 ? var 'BrakeFX7' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX7_wait' & set 'BrakeFX7' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'reverb' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX7' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.58 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX7_wait' 1400ms 1 & padfx 'reverb' 0.5 0.5 0 0.35 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX7' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX7_wait' 2600ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX7' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'reverb' off & set 'BrakeFX7' 0 : effect_disable_all :effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on : var 'BrakeFX7' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX7_wait' & set 'BrakeFX7' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'reverb' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX7' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.41 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX7_wait' 700ms 1 & padfx 'reverb' 0.5 0.5 0 0.35 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX7' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX7_wait' 1300ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX7' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'reverb' off & set 'BrakeFX7' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on

pad8.name: `slip_mode on ? get_text "SLIP" : get_text "STOP"`
pad8.color: slip_mode on ? blink 500ms ? color 'red' : color 10% 'red' : color 'green'

page.pad6: var 'brakeFXlong' 1 ? var 'BrakeFX5' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX5_wait' & set 'BrakeFX5' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'distortion' off & effect_active 'reverb' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX5' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.58 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX5_wait' 600ms 1 & padfx 'distortion' 0 0.35 0 0.45 & var 'BrakeFX5' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX6_filter' 1400ms 1 & padfx 'reverb' 0.3 0.5 0 0.35 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX5' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX5_wait' 2000ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX5' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'distortion' off & effect_active 'reverb' off & set 'BrakeFX5' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on : var 'BrakeFX5' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX5_wait' & set 'BrakeFX5' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'distortion' off & effect_active 'reverb' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX5' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.41 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX5_wait' 300ms 1 & padfx 'distortion' 0 0.35 0 0.45 & var 'BrakeFX5' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX6_filter' 700ms 1 & padfx 'reverb' 0.3 0.5 0 0.35 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX5' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX5_wait' 1000ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX5' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'distortion' off & effect_active 'reverb' off & set 'BrakeFX5' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on
page.pad7: var 'brakeFXlong' 1 ? var 'BrakeFX4' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX4_wait' & set 'BrakeFX4' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'cut' off & effect_active 'echo' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX4' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.58 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX4_wait' 1400ms 1 & padfx 'cut' 1 0.35 0.1 'Mute Beat:off' & var 'BrakeFX4' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX4_wait' 600ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.6 0.3 0.7 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX4' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX4_wait' 2000ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX4' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'cut' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BrakeFX4' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on : var 'BrakeFX4' 1 ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'BrakeFX4_wait' & set 'BrakeFX4' 0 & effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'cut' off & effect_active 'echo' off & play : play ? off & set 'BrakeFX4' 1 & padfx "brakestart" 0.41 & repeat_start 'BrakeFX4_wait' 700ms 1 & padfx 'cut' 1 0.35 0.1 'Mute Beat:off' & var 'BrakeFX4' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX4_wait' 300ms 1 & padfx 'echo' 0.8 0.6 0.3 0.7 'Trailing Stop:on' & var 'BrakeFX4' 1 ? repeat_start 'BrakeFX4_wait' 1000ms 1 & var 'BrakeFX4' 1 ? effect_active 'brakestart' off & effect_active 'cut' off & effect_active 'echo' off & set 'BrakeFX4' 0 : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : effect_disable_all : off & effect_active 'brakestart' on

param2.name: `effect_stems ? blink 500ms ? get_text "STEMS FX" : nothing : setting 'fxProcessing' & param_equal 'Pre-Fader' ? get_text 'Pre-Fader' : get_text 'Post-Fader'`
